case_name: Savelife Foundation vs Union of India
impact: Mandated zero liability and protection from police harassment for bystanders helping crash victims.

case_name: MC Mehta vs Union of India
principle: Polluter pays — vehicles causing pollution liable
impact: Mandated CNG conversion in Delhi public transport system (buses, autos) to curb high emission smog.

case_name: Paramjit Bhasin vs Union of India
principle: Strict overloading ban on commercial vehicles
impact: Held that no state government can issue notification allowing carriage of excess load by paying premium.

case_name: Sarla Verma vs Delhi Transport Corporation
impact: Established structured multipliers and deductions for personal expenses based on age and dependency.

case_name: National Insurance Co vs Pranay Sethi
principle: Future prospects additions in accident claims
impact: Standardized the percentages of future prospects (40% for self-employed, 50% for salaried under 40) in claims.

case_name: Parmanand Katara vs Union of India
principle: Immediate medical attention duty of all doctors
impact: Ruled that every doctor, government or private, must treat accident victims immediately without police paperwork.

case_name: State of Tamil Nadu vs K Balu
principle: Drunk driving ban on national/state highways
impact: Banned the sale of liquor within 500 meters of national and state highways to prevent drunk driving.

principle: Liability of financier in case of motor accidents
impact: Clarified that the registered owner remains liable under MV Act even if vehicle is financed by a bank.

case_name: Kartar Singh vs State of Haryana
principle: Mandatory reflectors on commercial slow vehicles
impact: Directed strict enforcement of reflective tape on tractor-trolleys and slow vehicles on highways.
Expanded compensations under conventional heads like loss of consortium, loss of care, and funeral expenses.
